_comment: Per-cell provenance registry for the coverage matrix (Wave 4 spec 5.4) - reviewed data file. live-verified = the grounding property shape was observed on a live tenant; documented-only = Microsoft Learn documents the shape but it has not been probed live, so the cell renders the provisional marker until verified (docs/testday-activation.md). Column-level entries apply to every row in that column unless a rowOverrides entry (keyed '<rowKey>.<columnKey>') exists for the cell. Wave 5 cleanup Part 1: all shipped entries are live-verified; the registry keeps documented-only semantics for future additions.

dlp.grounding: Per-location properties on Get-DlpCompliancePolicy (ExchangeLocation, SharePointLocation, OneDriveLocation, TeamsLocation, EndpointDlpLocation, PowerBIDlpLocation + *LocationException) - on the verified property list; Copilot row via VERIFIED EnforcementPlanes/Locations signals (2026-07-02 sandbox).

autoLabel.grounding: Get-AutoSensitivityLabelPolicy location and exception property shapes (ExchangeLocation, SharePointLocation, OneDriveLocation + *Exception) observed live (2026-07 TEST sandbox, Wave 5 cleanup Part 1).

retention.grounding: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy location properties (ExchangeLocation, SharePointLocation, OneDriveLocation, ModernGroupLocation, TeamsChannelLocation, TeamsChatLocation) observed live (2026-07 TEST sandbox, Wave 5 cleanup Part 1).

copilot.retention.grounding: Get-AppRetentionCompliancePolicy Applications token observed live: Users:M365Copilot (plural 'Users:' - the doc-grounded 'User:' singular was not the live shape). Cell un-held Wave 5 cleanup Part 1 per docs/testday-activation.md item 1.
